raw_consumer_statement: I've filed several disputes with Citi bank credit card and not XXXX of them have been resolved. I've informed Citibank that Im a victim of fraus and at this point i believe my identity and card information is on the XXXX web. Each time i have called in to check the status of my disputes I have been told that they were pending and that i would receive a letter when it was complete and have never received any letters. Ive attempted to make minimum payments even though the balance was incorrect until i recently realized that I never received the outcome of the disputes.
